history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A screenshot of a phone screen displaying a direct message conversation. The header shows a profile picture of a young man with light-colored hair, his name "JAEMIN" with a blue verification checkmark, and his username "na.jaemin0813". Below this, there's a larger circular profile picture of the same person. More details about the profile include "13 jt pengikut" (13 million followers), "280 postingan" (280 posts), and "Tidak saling mengikuti di Instagram" (Not following each other on Instagram). A button labeled "Lihat profil" (View profile) is visible.

The chat messages are displayed chronologically. The first message bubble, dated "23 MEI 9.17 PM", is purple and reads "hai pacar" (hi darling). The next purple bubble, from the same timestamp, asks "mau jadi pacarku ga" (will you be my girlfriend). A timestamp "1.49 PM" is shown, followed by two purple message bubbles. The first reads "aku suka kamu" (I like you), and the second says "i love u". Another timestamp, "1.53 PM", appears, followed by two light gray message bubbles, indicating replies from the other person. The first reads "hai sayang" (hi dear), and the second, accompanied by a small profile picture of the same young man in the lower left, states "kamu sekarang jadi milikku" (you are mine now). At the bottom, there is a text input field with the placeholder "Kirim pesan..." (Send message...) and a purple send icon.

The overall style is that of a clean, modern mobile messaging interface. The dominant colors are white, purple, and gray, with the purple used for outgoing messages and UI elements, and gray for incoming messages. The lighting appears to be standard indoor screen lighting, with no dramatic shadows. The mood is intimate and romantic, conveyed through the affectionate language of the messages. The background is plain white, typical of a chat interface.
